name: Craig Cerrig-gleisiad NNR
terrain: Boggy grass, rocky cwm, steep ground
highlights: Spectacular glacial cwm with rare arctic-alpine flora and ravens.
viewpoints: Dramatic crag views; Pen y Fan from ridge
picnic_spots: Above the cwm on the plateau
parking_start: Layby on A470 opposite the cwm
food_drink_nearby: Tai'r Bull Inn Libanus; Beacons Visitor Centre cafe
